name: CleanSpeak
description: CleanSpeak — Profanity filter and content moderation platform with customizable word lists and user reputation scoring.

seo.title: CleanSpeak — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: CleanSpeak: CleanSpeak — Profanity filter and content moderation platform with customizable word lists and user reputation scoring.

when_to_use: Filtering profanity and harmful language in gaming chat at scale
Deploying moderation across gaming platforms for all ages
Building user reputation and ban management on top of filtering
Running automated content approval queues with rule-based logic

pros: User reputation scoring is genuinely useful
Predictable pricing vs enterprise T&S vendors
cons: Heavy on profanity filtering, weaker on context
AI capabilities lag modern ML-first vendors
Not ideal for image or video moderation
review.verdict: Reliable profanity and chat moderation stack for gaming and forums; modern LLM vendors beat it on nuance.
review.best_for: Gaming, kids platforms, and forums needing strong chat filtering with self-host option.
review.not_for: Teams needing state-of-the-art contextual AI or multimodal coverage.
